ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., smartwatch, fitness tracker) */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date the device was manufactured */,
  "device_firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "device_serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the device */,
  "device_manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the device manufacturer */,
  "device_software_version" TEXT /* Current software version of the device */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "device_last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration for the device */,
  "device_last_software_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last software update for the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type (e.g., acceleration, gyroscope) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "sensor_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  "sensor_range" TEXT /* Range of the sensor */,
  "sensor_frequency" TEXT /* Data collection frequency of the sensor */,
  "sensor_power_consumption" TEXT /* Power consumption of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the sensor is installed in */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "sensor_firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the sensor */,
  "sensor_last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration for the sensor */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "sensor_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or metadata about the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acceleration_data" (
  "acceleration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acceleration data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the data is from */,
  "accX" REAL /* X-axis acceleration value */,
  "accY" REAL /* Y-axis acceleration value */,
  "accZ" REAL /* Z-axis acceleration value */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "data_collection_time" TEXT /* Time the data was collected */,
  "data_collection_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the data collection */,
  "data_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the data point */,
  "data_flags" TEXT /* Any flags or metadata associated with the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acceleration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acceleration_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gyroscope_data" (
  "gyroscope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gyroscope data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the data is from */,
  "gyroX" REAL /* X-axis gyroscope value */,
  "gyroY" REAL /* Y-axis gyroscope value */,
  "gyroZ" REAL /* Z-axis gyroscope value */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "data_collection_time" TEXT /* Time the data was collected */,
  "data_collection_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the data collection */,
  "data_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the data point */,
  "data_flags" TEXT /* Any flags or metadata associated with the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gyroscope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gyroscope_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orientation_data" (
  "orientation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orientation data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the data is from */,
  "oriAzimuth" REAL /* Azimuth value */,
  "oriPitch" REAL /* Pitch value */,
  "oriRoll" REAL /* Roll value */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "data_collection_time" TEXT /* Time the data was collected */,
  "data_collection_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the data collection */,
  "data_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the data point */,
  "data_flags" TEXT /* Any flags or metadata associated with the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orientation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orientation_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the company */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the device */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the device was accessed */,
  "access_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the access event */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device version */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the device */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the device version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., released, beta, deprecated) */,
  "version_release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_versions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software update */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "update_version" TEXT /* Version of the software update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the software update was applied */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g., installed, pending, failed) */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or metadata about the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_updates_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_data" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Value of the calibration */,
  "calibration_time" TEXT /* Time the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the calibration */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or metadata about the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
